tier_role: Intrinsic messiness cohort selected by record properties, then measured against current parser/readiness behavior.
selection_method: Selected by dataset category, dataset messiness, parse/block decision, raw note complexity, expected option count, and missing-info traits.
Current parser failure rate was measured after selection and was not used as the tier selection target.
overlap_policy: No overlap with other generated cohorts in this selection run.
